description: Install dependencies, verify baseline builds, and set up feature branch. This ensures the project is in a working state before making changes.
steps: Run npm install to install all dependencies
Run npm run lint to verify baseline lint passes
Run npm run build to verify the project builds successfully
Create a feature branch named feature/multi-source-music-integration from main
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint passes with zero errors
npm run build succeeds with zero errors
A feature branch exists and is checked out
findings: Node.js v24.18.0 installed via mise (MISE_NODE_VERIFY=false needed due to gpg-agent not being configured). npm 11.16.0. npm install produced 5 vulnerabilities (non-blocking). Lint passes with 0 errors (2 warnings in SearchFilters.tsx for unused vars). Build succeeds with Next.js 16.2.4 Turbopack. mise.toml created in project root to pin node version.
